productTitle: Ubiquiti UniFi Switch Pro Max 16 PoE
name: Ubiquiti UniFi Switch Pro Max 16 PoE
title: Ubiquiti UniFi Switch Pro Max 16 PoE
short_description: Buy Ubiquiti UniFi Switch Pro Max 16 PoE. Price from 401.45 USD. Worldwide delivery! Full description, specifications, reviews, extended warranty option. ☎ +371 60 000 888.
description: The Ubiquiti Switch Pro Max 16 PoE is a powerful and versatile Layer 3 Etherlighting™ switch designed for demanding networks. This feature-packed device delivers high performance, flexible connectivity options, and advanced management capabilities, making it ideal for businesses, data centers, and prosumers seeking a reliable and scalable networking solution. Experience exceptional data transfer rates with a total non-blocking throughput of 42 Gbps and a switching capacity of 84 Gbps. This ensures smooth and efficient network operation even under heavy traffic loads.

detailed_description.heading: Performance and Flexibility
detailed_description.text: The Ubiquiti Switch Pro Max 16 PoE is a powerful and versatile Layer 3 Etherlighting™ switch designed for demanding networks. This feature-packed device delivers high performance, flexible connectivity options, and advanced management capabilities, making it ideal for businesses, data centers, and prosumers seeking a reliable and scalable networking solution. Experience exceptional data transfer rates with a total non-blocking throughput of 42 Gbps and a switching capacity of 84 Gbps. This ensures smooth and efficient network operation even under heavy traffic loads.

detailed_description.heading: Connectivity and Processing
detailed_description.text: Equipped with a powerful quad-core processor, the Switch Pro Max 16 PoE effortlessly handles complex network tasks, routing, and security features. Take advantage of a variety of connection options to suit your network needs. The switch features four 2.5 Gigabit Ethernet ports for high-speed connections to compatible devices; twelve Gigabit Ethernet ports for versatile network connectivity and two SFP+ ports for fiber optic connections, ideal for extending your network over longer distances. The Etherlighting™ technology integrates LEDs into each RJ45 port. These LEDs display vital information such as port location, speed/link status, and native VLAN/network, providing a clear visual representation of your network activity.

detailed_description.heading: Power Your Devices with PoE++
detailed_description.text: The switch offers a total PoE power budget of 180W, allowing you to power multiple devices simultaneously. You can also configure PoE power settings for individual ports for optimized power usage. 12 of the Gigabit Ethernet ports support PoE++ standards. This allows the switch to deliver up to 60W of power per port, powering a wide range of compatible devices like IP cameras, VoIP phones, and wireless access points. This eliminates the need for separate power supplies, simplifying deployment and reducing cabling clutter.

detailed_description.heading: Enhanced Management and Control
detailed_description.text: The Switch Pro Max 16 PoE supports Layer 3 routing capabilities, enabling efficient network segmentation and traffic management. Safeguard your network with features like VLANs, port security, and access control lists (ACLs). These tools help prevent unauthorized access and isolate network traffic for increased security. Manage the switch through a user-friendly web-based interface or the intuitive UniFi Network application (version 8.1.127 and later). This allows for centralized configuration, monitoring, and troubleshooting of your network devices from anywhere.

detailed_description.heading: Easy Deployment and Use
detailed_description.text: Built with high-quality components and a robust design, the Switch Pro Max 16 PoE is built to withstand demanding network environments. It operates efficiently in a wide temperature range, ensuring reliable performance. The switch features a compact and sleek design with multiple mounting options for desktop, wall, or rack installations, adapting to various deployment scenarios. Switch Pro Max 16 PoE operates silently without a fan, making it ideal for noise-sensitive environments like offices or conference rooms.
